title: Users
noAccess: No access to the user list.

agent.label: Create an AI agent?
agent.hint: Automatically creates an AI recruiter agent with its own WhatsApp interview flow. The Meta steps (linking the number, approving the template) follow as a task.

branches.title: Branches
branches.hint: Determines which branches this user is coupled to. This already limits which candidates are visible and editable (candidates outside these branches are hidden); other areas (vacancies, customers, …) aren't branch-scoped yet.
branches.emptyHint: No branches selected — this user still sees every candidate, unrestricted.
branches.saveFailed: Couldn't save branches. Please try again.
branches.previewEmpty: No starting set — this role has no branches, so the new user starts unrestricted.
